subject: english
title: Sound Training Camp — Short Vowels & Magic E
subtitle: Drill the 5 short vowel sounds (a e i o u) and the Magic E rule that switches them. 20 slides, 6 drills.

content: Compare Japanese's 5 fixed vowel sounds to English's 5 vowel letters that each make different sounds.
Produce the 5 short vowel sounds /æ/ /e/ /ɪ/ /ɑ/ /ʌ/ with correct mouth shape, avoiding common Japanese-speaker substitutions.
Explain how a silent Magic E at the end of a word makes the vowel before it say its own name.
language: Hear and produce danger-pair words that differ only in vowel sound: cat/cut, sit/set, cap/cape, hop/hope.
Read short-vowel and Magic E words aloud in isolation and in sentences.
Sort words correctly as short-vowel or Magic E by ear and by sight.
